text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: obrien->hoek

This was submitted March 15, 1997.  Since then, another qmail port has been 
submitted.  The author of the 2nd port seems willing to merge the two and 
do all the real work.  Keep the two relevant PRs together until then. 

This was submitted on Mar. 15, 1997.....  :(
